description_long: This object is a white Apple iPhone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a glass touchscreen display with a visible home button at the bottom, a speaker grille, and a front-facing camera above the screen. The back is smooth and glossy, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo in the center and a single camera lens with a flash in the top left corner. The sides are metallic and flat, with minimal visible buttons or ports, contributing to its minimalist design. The device appears compact and lightweight, typical of smartphones designed for handheld use. The screen displays a classic iOS interface with app icons, a dock, and a status bar at the top.
description: A white Apple iPhone with a glass touchscreen, silver Apple logo on the back, and a single rear camera. The device is slim, rectangular, and features a classic iOS home screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass touchscreen, home button, speaker, front camera, and iOS app icons.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim, flat metallic edge with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy white surface, centered silver Apple logo, and single camera with flash in the top left.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim, flat edge with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly visible against the white surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a classic iOS home screen with app icons, a dock at the bottom, a wallpaper with water droplets, and a status bar showing time, signal, and battery.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens with a flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: A circular home button is located below the screen on the front; side buttons are not visible in these views.
